question_text: Which of the following is an example of gravitational potential energy store?

options.label: A
options.text: A book sitting on a high shelf

explanation: Gravitational potential energy is stored in objects that are raised above the ground. A book on a high shelf has gravitational potential energy because of its height and mass. A battery stores chemical energy, a stretched rubber band stores elastic potential energy, and a hot cup of tea stores thermal energy.
